content: XCTest async @MainActor patterns: Mark test class @MainActor to test MainActor-isolated code without MainActor.assumeIsolated. For async state machine tests use async test methods with await Task.sleep for settling. Closure injection seam pattern from AppState tests: AppState(onStartRecording: { ... }, onStopRecording: { ... }) -- extend same pattern to transcription via onRunTranscription: @escaping (URL) async throws -> String closure injected at init, defaulting to real CLIRunner call. This makes Transcriber unit-testable without spawning Process.
